did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review of features used in computer vision systems for melanoma characterization. The authors explicitly state in Section III that they 'leave out the issues of machine learning and classification methods' and focus only on image acquisition, pre-processing, segmentation, and feature extraction (e.g., texture analysis, color features). No AI/ML models were used to obtain results in this specific study.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
